assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-6 show '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows following.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 8-11 show '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 14-16 show '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-14 (Step 2) state: 'Examined available MCP tools for Serena instances', lists available tools, then 'No Serena tools found (no tools matching pattern mcp__<instance>__find_symbol, get_symbols_overview, etc.)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 19-24 (Step 3.1) state: 'Checked for Atlassian MCP server among available tools', 'No tools prefixed with mcp__atlassian__ found', 'Atlassian MCP is not available'. Lines 28-29 (Step 3.2) state: 'User chose option 2: Skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually'. Lines 31-37 (Step 3.4) show manual entry of Project key, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 14 states: 'User chose to continue without code intelligence', indicating the user was prompted about this choice.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 22-26 show '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 95-98 (Step 10) show: 'No existing Security Configuration found in CLAUDE.md', 'User declined to enable security triage', 'Result: Security Configuration section skipped'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 27 after Bug Configuration).
